entry.summary: Heck of a CSS trick here from Dongsung Kim. There are hidden HDR videos playing at the corners of this page. When a HDR-capable browser encounters one, it switches to HDR mode. entry.title: Snapshot Testing Tutorial for SwiftUI: Getting Started [FREE]
entry.summary: Learn how to test your SwiftUI iOS views in a simple and fast way using snapshot testing.

author.name: Ray Wenderlich | High quality programming tutorials: iOS, Android, Swift, Kotlin, Unity, and more

entry.title: Integrate Combine Into an App [SUBSCRIBER]
entry.summary: One of the best ways to test your Combine skills is to put them to use in an app! In this course, put the finishing touches on a Chuck Norris jokes app, using Combine to fetch jokes, translate them into another language, and even - as a bonus - learn how to use Combine with Core Data to save jokes to tell your friends later.

author.name: Ray Wenderlich | High quality programming tutorials: iOS, Android, Swift, Kotlin, Unity, and more

entry.title: Video Streaming Tutorial for iOS: Getting Started [FREE]
entry.summary: Learn how to build a video streaming app using AVKit and AVFoundation frameworks.

author.name: Ray Wenderlich | High quality programming tutorials: iOS, Android, Swift, Kotlin, Unity, and more

entry.title: 102: “WWDC21, two months later”, with special guest Jordan Morgan
entry.summary: Jordan Morgan returns to the show to discuss some of the key new APIs and frameworks that were announced at WWDC21, and how they can be integrated into the apps that we build, now that about two months have passed since the conference took place.

entry.title: Future of Combine, Async/Await, Is SwiftUI Ready, iOS Dev Career Arc

author.name: Ray Wenderlich | High quality programming tutorials: iOS, Android, Swift, Kotlin, Unity, and more

entry.title: SwiftUI Custom Path Drawing - Map Balloon Shape
SwiftUI Photo Picker - Compressed Images, UIViewControllerRepresentable
Audio with AVFoundation [SUBSCRIBER]
entry.summary: AVFoundation is Apple’s advanced framework for working with time-based media, such as audio and video. This course covers the essentials to using the AVFoundation framework to create audio based apps. You’ll learn how to set up audio sessions; record and playback audio; audio metering, how to control volume and rate; special effects, such as pitch and reverb; and generating speech from text.

author.name: Ray Wenderlich | High quality programming tutorials: iOS, Android, Swift, Kotlin, Unity, and more

entry.title: SwiftUI Gradient Buttons | Linear, Radial & Angular Gradients
